history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man stands on a sidewalk at night, looking to his left. He is wearing a loose-fitting white t-shirt and baggy black pants with white stitching that forms a graphic design of figures. He has one hand in his pocket and the other is touching his hair. The background features a textured white wall with graffiti, a metal grate covering a doorway, and an orange pole to the far left. The lighting is dim, casting shadows and creating a moody, urban atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by muted tones of white, grey, black, and orange. The style is realistic with a hint of street art.
